title: OFFO Large Bore Shower Hose 1.2m, 11mm Bore High-Flow Anti-Kink Shower Hose Stainless Steel Replacement High Pressure Shower Hoses,Universal Leakproof,Chrome
features: [11mm Large Inner Bore] Extra enlarged inner bore, expand water flow passage to provide high-flow shower performance even at low water pressure. You can enjoy a higher flow shower experience.

[Anti-Kink] The sprinkler connection can be freely rotated, which is convenient for installation and use, and effectively prevents the hose from knotting and tangling, making it easier for you to take a bath.

[Premium Shower Hose] Our shower head hose is made of high quality stainless steel outer tube, PVC inner tube and precision machined with A-grade forged brass, which is high temperature resistance, anti-explosion, sealing, leakproof, high flexibility and durable.
[Wide Application] It is not only suitable for bathing, but also for toilet cleaning, refilling fish tanks, cleaning baby diapers, flushing potty chairs, pet bathing, etc.

[After Sale Service] We are committed to providing high-quality shower hose for customers. If you have any dissatisfaction with our products, please feel free to contact us, we provide return service within two years.
description: Product Description OFFO Shower Products OFFO Shower Head OFFO Shower Hose OFFO PVC Shower Hose Colour Chrome Colour Chrome,Matte Black Colour Sliver,White,Matte Black Cover Size 13cm Size 1.2m-5.0m Size 1.2m-3.5m Flexible Kink-free Stainless Steel Shower Hose External hose body is made of superior stainless steel,anti-oxidation and corrosion-resistant. Classic chrome surface that works with most decoration styles. Explosion-proof EPDM Inner Pipe Inner tube is made of non-toxic,odorless EPDM material. Anti-explosion,high-pressure proof and high-temperature resistance,which can withstand 90° high temperature without deformation. Conical Connectors The connectors at both ends are solid brass to ensure no cracks or breaks. 360° anti-winding design is not allow to leakage and knotted;dual conical connectors to prevent connection errors.
